meta.title: Making Power System Cybersecurity Part of the Engineering Process
meta.description: The difference in how engineers and cybersecurity professionals approach a project is large. This presentation looks at how to add the engineering discipline to cybersecurity. Specifically it shows how this is being standardized in two IEEE standards efforts. Nathan Wallace of Cybirical, the chair of those two standard's working groups, presents the approach and some detailed examples.
